reviews.review_description: The app won't turn on.  It works fine for a while then I get a wi fi  error message. All my other apps that work on wi fi including youtube or yahoo work fine. I don't know what to do except try to delete it and reinstall which is troublesome.
I LOVE this app its perfect for Spicy pics

They make you spend money & then you can’t even upload your videos & asks them to be in 8 pixel format. Who even has that.

Terrible app & not clear how to use

It does not allow you access to your media once bought and paid for. It tells you saved in your space folder, but it's empty. Zuck the cuck Wong let you request a refund, ao call your cc company to stopbthe charges from processing. 
skumbags
This is a great app but one thing that needs to be added is to be able to see the pictures from different angles
This does not work with shapelab lite and there is nothing usefull apart from useing a laptop to take any pics that got turned from 2d to 3d and the internet info is useless.

reviews.review_title: Can only view photos in app
reviews.review_description: It seems to work well, but there does not seem to be anyways to download your photos to you device so you can only view in the app itself. If I'm paying for the photos, I want to own the photos.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable feedback! We're happy to hear the app is working well for you. The ability to export files to your device is already on our roadmap for upcoming updates. Please stay tuned!

If you have any further questions or suggestions, feel free to reach out to us at admin@scopevr.fun

reviews.review_title: good app but 50p a photo is absurd
reviews.review_description: id pay for the app im not paying per individual photo

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We're working on making our app more affordable and user-friendly. Your feedback is valuable to us, and we'll keep improving. If you have any further questions or concerns, feel free to reach out to us at admin@scopevr.fun

reviews.review_title: Not free,  uploads photos to server
reviews.review_description: I tried this app to convert 2d to 3d found out the following uses coins credits system, gives you 5 free credits conversions then you have buy coins in packages, averages about 50 cents each to convert, per coin, and it uploads your private photos to their server for conversion, I recommend not to use this app, any private photo will be stored on their server.

developer_response.body: Hi, our server requires powerful AI to process high-quality depth maps, making it challenging to support this app without coin packages. You can still earn free coins daily through "Daily Rewards." Any content uploaded to the server is deleted after one hour. Thank you.

reviews.review_description:
So once a day you go on here and get a coin. Then you can use that coin to take a normal 2D image and give it a very high end 3D look. I've had a couple of images that didn't work great, but so far this is the best 2D to 3D converter that I've seen. 

You can of course pay money and covert more things if you are hard core into turning all your images into 3D.

Regardless, give this a try. It's just really cool.
